fields.title: Amplitudes
fields.description: Governs the attenuation of the first n octaves in the generated noise.

fields.title: First Octave
fields.description: Governs the general frequency characteristics of the generated noise. Lower value results in noise with lower frequency content.

fields.title: Name
fields.description: The string used to initialize the noise. Has no impact on the qualitative aspects of the generated values.
